overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 featuring the protagonist Geralt walking through a sunlit meadow filled with wildflowers, crossing an ancient moss-covered stone bridge in a rural fantasy landscape during golden hour.

scene_state.functional_zone: grassy meadow with red poppies and purple wildflowers

events.description: sun begins to set behind trees creating lens flares and backlighting

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through tall grass and wildflowers toward a tree line

entered.detail: rolling green hill covered in tall grass
clusters of bright red poppy flowers scattered through the grass
tall purple wildflowers dotting the meadow
scattered leafy trees marking the edge of the meadow

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with Geralt walking through a wide meadow filled with green grass and colorful wildflowers. The sun is bright and the sky is clear as he approaches a line of trees in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: forested hillside with ancient stone ruins visible in distance

events.description: transition from open meadow to denser tree cover with strong backlighting

agents.ego_description: navigating through trees and tall grass while approaching ancient ruins

entered.detail: thick cluster of trees creating dappled shade
weathered stone pillars and structures visible on the horizon
worn dirt path leading toward the ruins

segments.scene_description: Moving into a wooded area, the camera passes through dappled sunlight and lens flares as ancient stone ruins become visible in the distance. The ground transitions from pure meadow to mixed grass and dirt paths.

scene_state.functional_zone: ancient stone bridge with moss-covered wooden planks

events.description: steps onto the ancient stone bridge with broken wooden planks
slight camera adjustment as walking over uneven wooden bridge planks

agents.ego_description: carefully walking across the mossy wooden planks of the stone bridge

entered.detail: weathered stone bridge with ornate pillars and mossy wooden decking
tall carved stone pillars marking the bridge entrance
broken and moss-covered wooden planks forming the bridge walkway
low stone walls along the sides of the bridge

segments.scene_description: The character crosses a prominent ancient stone bridge featuring moss-covered wooden planks and ornate stone pillars. The bridge spans a ravine and represents a clear architectural landmark in the natural landscape.

events.description: exits the bridge onto a paved stone path

agents.ego_description: continuing along the stone pathway away from the bridge into open countryside

entered.detail: flagstone path leading away from the bridge
massive gnarled tree with twisted branches
broken stone columns flanking the path

segments.scene_description: Having crossed the bridge, the scene opens onto a stone pathway flanked by ancient stone pillars and a large gnarled tree. The path continues into the rolling green countryside with distant mountains visible.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a vibrant, open meadow into a wooded landscape that culminates in a vista of rolling countryside. It begins with Geralt walking through wide expanses of green grass and colorful wildflowers under a bright, clear sky. As he approaches a line of trees, the scene shifts into a wooded area where the ground transitions to dirt paths and the light becomes dappled with lens flares, revealing ancient stone ruins ahead. The camera then follows him across a prominent ancient stone bridge with moss-covered planks and ornate pillars spanning a deep ravine. Finally, the path opens up past a large gnarled tree and stone pillars, leading the view out toward the distant mountains of the green countryside.
